reviewScope.description: /review writes scoping output -- categorized concerns, file chunks, cross-cutting analysis

unitTestSkill.description: Independent /unit-test skill reading REVIEW-SCOPE.md, writing REVIEW-UNIT.md

bugHuntSkill.description: Independent /bug-hunt skill running hunter+advocate+judge, writing REVIEW-BUGS.md with leaning indicators

uatSkill.description: Independent /uat skill testing against CONTRACT.json criteria, writing REVIEW-UAT.md

reviewArtifactPaths.description: Corrected review artifact paths that the new review skills write to

scopeRequired.description: /unit-test, /bug-hunt, /uat must detect missing REVIEW-SCOPE.md and prompt user to run /review first

idempotentRerun.description: Re-running any review stage must overwrite previous output cleanly without accumulation

judgeLeaningVisible.description: /bug-hunt output must include judge leaning (accept/reject/uncertain) with confidence for each finding

noStagePrompting.description: Review skills must not prompt user to select stages -- each skill is independently invoked
